name_romaji: Iino Hachimangū renchō san narabi ni jo
name_en: Eulogy and preface for the bamboo blind of Iino Hachimangū
description_en: A calligraphic eulogy and preface classified as a calligraphic work among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2004-04-28. It is located at Taira Aza Hachiman-kōji.

name_en: Heart Sutra (Prajnaparamita Hridaya)
description_en: A copy of the Heart Sutra classified as a calligraphic work among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2005-04-27. It is located at Yotsukura-machi Yakuō-ji Aza Hanawa.

name_en: Album of old sutra copies from the Shōyo edition
description_en: An album of old sutra copies (tekagami) classified as a calligraphic work among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2005-04-27. It is located at Yotsukura-machi Yakuō-ji Aza Hanawa.

name_en: Classical books held by Nyorai-ji
description_en: Classical books (tenseki) classified as classical texts among tangible cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1995-04-28. They are located at Taira Yamazaki Aza Yanome.

name_en: Enju Gohōroku (Buddhist text)
description_en: A classical Buddhist text classified as a classical text among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1995-04-28. It is located at Yotsukura-machi Yakuō-ji Aza Hanawa.

name_en: Classical texts and initiation certificates of Hōjuin
description_en: Classical texts and initiation certificates classified as classical texts among tangible cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2009-04-27. They are located at Ogawa-machi Nishiogawa Aza Kamiyachi.

name_en: Yakuō-ji documents
description_en: Historical documents (komonjo) classified as ancient documents among tangible cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1987-03-31. They are located at Yotsukura-machi Yakuō-ji Aza Hanawa.

name_en: Maki family documents
description_en: Historical documents (komonjo) classified as ancient documents among tangible cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2013-04-24. They are located at Taira Aza Rokkenmon.

name_en: Documents held by Iseya
description_en: Historical documents (komonjo) classified as ancient documents among tangible cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2014-05-01. They are located at Jōban Fujiwara-machi Tebai (archaeology museum).

name_en: Stone slab stupa (itaishi tōba)
description_en: A stone slab stupa classified as an archaeological artifact among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1968-12-27. It is located at Taira Shimohirakubo Aza Moroni.

name_en: Kofun-period beads
description_en: Kofun-period beads classified as archaeological artifacts among tangible cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1968-12-27. They are located at Taira Kamiyasaku Aza Hosoya.

name_en: Bronze bell-shaped harness ornament (gyōyō)
description_en: A bronze bell-shaped harness ornament (gyōyō) classified as an archaeological artifact among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1989-03-25. It is located at Taira Aza Takatsuki.

name_en: Kofun-period horse bell (bataku)
description_en: A Kofun-period horse bell (bataku) classified as an archaeological artifact among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2002-04-30. It is located at Taira Kamitakaku Aza Yatsumi.

name_en: Old map of the castle town of Taira
description_en: An old map classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1968-12-27.

name_en: Monument of the Tenmei famine
description_en: A stone monument classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1973-06-30. It is located at Ogawa-machi Kamiogawa Aza Uenouchi.

name_en: Mathematical votive tablet (sangaku) of Kamiokeuri Kumakura Shrine
description_en: A mathematical votive tablet (sangaku) classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1977-05-04. It is located at Kawamae-machi Kamiokeuri Aza Miyashita.

name_romaji: Koshiwa monjo (tsuketari) mokuzō En no Ozunu zō; mokuzō Yakushi Nyorai ryūzō
name_en: Koshiwa documents, with wooden statues of En no Ozunu and standing Yakushi Nyorai
description_en: Historical documents with attached wooden statues, classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1982-03-26. They are located at Higashida-machi Itchōme.

name_romaji: Bunroku yonen Hayashijō-mura kenchichō (tsuketari) Genroku jūgonen Hayashijō-mura shinden mizuchō
name_en: Bunroku 4 land survey register of Hayashijō village, with the Genroku 15 new-field register
description_en: Land survey registers classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1985-03-29. They are located at Onahama Hayashijō Aza Daimon.

name_en: Uwadaira documents, with three additional documents
description_en: Historical documents classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1988-03-25. They are located at Taira Aza Agetsuchi.

name_en: Prohibition edict of Toyotomi Hideyoshi
description_en: A prohibition edict classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1990-03-27. It is located at Taira Aza Dōnemachi (art museum).

name_en: Letter of Katakura Kagetsuna
description_en: A written letter classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1997-05-13. It is located at Taira Aza Hachiman-kōji.

name_en: Pictorial map of the castle town of Iwaki Taira
description_en: A pictorial map classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1998-04-10. It is located at Taira Aza Yanagimachi.

name_en: Portrait of Andō Shigenaga
description_en: A portrait classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2001-04-27. It is located at Taira Aza Furukajimachi.

name_en: Portrait of Andō Nobutomo
description_en: A portrait classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2001-04-27. It is located at Taira Aza Furukajimachi.

name_en: Moon-shaped box (tsukigata-bako)
description_en: A moon-shaped box classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2003-04-25. It is located at Taira Yamazaki Aza Yanome.

name_romaji: Taira-han goteni Matsui-ke igaku kankei shiryō
name_en: Medical materials of the Matsui family, physicians of the Taira domain
description_en: Medical-related materials classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2005-04-27. They are located at Taira Shimotakaku Aza Shimizu.

name_en: Picture of the commendation of a virtuous woman
description_en: A pictorial work classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2006-04-28. It is located at Ogawa-machi Shioda Aza Miyanoushiro and Takahagi Aza Ienomae.

name_romaji: Kunitama sekishitsu-ki narabi ni shutsudohin; hako
name_en: Record of the Kunitama stone chamber with excavated objects and box
description_en: A record together with excavated objects, classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2007-06-27. They are located at Taira Suganami Aza Miyamae.

name_en: Notice board of the Kasama domain
description_en: A public notice board classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2010-04-23. It is located at Taira Nakakabeya Aza Seto.

name_romaji: Iwaki Taira hanshi Nakamura Nuhaya kankei shiryō
name_en: Materials relating to Nakamura Nuhaya, retainer of the Iwaki Taira domain
description_en: Related materials classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2011-10-20. They are located at Taira Aza Rokkenmon.

name_en: Origin history of Chōfuku-ji
description_en: An origin history (engi) classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2014-05-01. It is located at Ogawa-machi Shimoogawa Aza Uenodai.

name_en: Picture of the Andō family hunting grounds
description_en: A pictorial work classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2014-05-01. It is located at Uchigō Tsuzura-machi Itamiyazawa.

name_en: Wooden seated statue of Aizen Myōō
description_en: A wooden seated statue of Aizen Myōō classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2015-05-01. It is located at Taira Shimokabeya Aza Shuku.

name_en: Wooden seated statue of Zen Master Seishin Shuyō
description_en: A wooden seated statue classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2015-05-01. It is located at Taira Shimoarakawa Aza Suwashita.

name_en: Pictorial map of the castle town of Iwaki Taira in Ōshū
description_en: A pictorial map classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2016-05-02. It is located at Onahama Aza Kanmachi.

name_romaji: Bunroku yonen Iwasaki Henjōin bunya-chō (tsuketari) Keichō shichinen Iwaki Iwasaki-gun Henjōin onawauchi mizuchō
name_en: Bunroku 4 land register of Henjōin at Iwasaki, with the Keichō 7 survey register
description_en: Land registers classified as a historical material among tangible cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2026-05-01. They are located at Onahama Sumiyoshi Aza Karamimachi.

name_en: Technique of making Iwaki painted banners
description_en: The technique of making Iwaki painted banners (e-nobori), classified as an intangible cultural property. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 2011-10-20. It is located at Taira Shōgatsu-machi.

name_en: Papier-mache molds of Hisanohama
description_en: Papier-mache molds classified as tangible folk cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1972-10-12. They are located at Kashima-machi Shimoyata Aza Chirino (Denshōgō).

name_romaji: Iino Hachimangū yabusame no yōguirui oyobi kensen no saiki
name_en: Yabusame implements and offering vessels of Iino Hachimangū
description_en: Horseback archery implements and offering vessels classified as tangible folk cultural properties. They are municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1981-04-23. They are located at Taira Aza Hachiman-kōji.

name_en: Votive tablet (ema) depicting the Shirakuwa festival
description_en: A votive tablet (ema) classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated by Iwaki City, with designation dated 1997-05-13. It is located at Taira Kitakabeya Aza Kamishita.
